headline: Ultra-Fast, Reliable Internet from Xfinity Coming to Bradford County, Florida
summary: BRADFORD COUNTY, Fla., March 02, 2026--Comcast is connecting more than 3,500 new homes and businesses in Hampton, Lawtey, Starke and surrounding areas to multi-gigabit, symmetrical Internet from America’s smartest and most reliable converged network. Xfinity brings Internet, mobile, entertainment, and smart home services into one simple, seamless solution – giving customers more speed, savings, and control over their connected lives. These Bradford County communities will soon join the nearly 65
